clinical_note: Endocrinology prior-auth request for semaglutide (Ozempic) in type 2 diabetes. Structured EHR data is available for this member. Free-text note intentionally omits numeric A1C, BMI, and medication trial details.

payer_policy.rules: Coverage requires a documented type 2 diabetes diagnosis, most recent A1C of at least 7.0%, metformin trial of at least 3 months at tolerated dose, and BMI recorded in the chart.
